svg.title: XSS Session Hijacking Attack Flow
svg.desc: Step-by-step diagram showing how an attacker steals a session cookie via XSS and uses it to impersonate the victim

g.text: Step 1 — victim logs in to legitimate server
Vulnerability: cookie set without HttpOnly flag
JavaScript can now read document.cookie in any tab
Step 2 — victim visits attacker's malicious page (social engineering)
Step 3 — XSS payload fires in victim's browser, steals cookie
Step 4 — attacker uses stolen session ID to impersonate victim
Account hijacked — attacker authenticated as victim
All without knowing the victim's password
